title: Hellsing Ultimate
sourceNotes: 10-episode OVA series (2006-2012), each episode adapting one full manga volume. Manga complete at 92 chapters / 10 volumes. The earlier 2001 Hellsing TV series (id 270) is a separate anime with an anime-original ending and is not covered here. Per-OVA chapter ranges are estimated as ~9 chapters per volume.

mappings.arc: Volume 2: Order of the Knights of the Round Table
Volume 4: The Captain / Rip Van Winkle
